chips.text: sooner if vision change or severe pain

history_draft.text: Patient seen with conjunctivitis symptoms for [duration]. Laterality: [laterality]. Redness and discharge: [redness_or_discharge_context]. Itch, pain, photophobia: [itch_pain_photophobia_context]. Vision change: [vision_change_context]. Contact lens: [contact_lens_context]. Exposure or contact history: [exposure_contact_context]. [Relevant negatives reviewed]. [Additional history].

clinical_blockers: The broad alias eye infection, external-eye examination, fluorescein, eye movements, red reflex, fundoscopy, visual fields, general patient-question field, and autonomous interpretation remain unsupported.
Conjunctivitis subtype, infection, keratitis, trauma, or corneal disease must not be inferred from individual symptoms.
Medication choice or dose, referral urgency, and treatment remain clinician responsibilities.
